perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seated in an indoor setting with a large spread of Korean fried chicken, rice, and kimchi in front of her. She begins by eating a large, crispy piece of chicken using chopsticks. (2) She transitions to eating methods, starting with a bite of plain white rice followed by chicken. (3) She then eats a piece of chicken topped with kimchi. (4) She holds a bottle of Buldak sauce to the camera, pours it over the chicken, and eats it. (5) Finally, she pours sesame oil from a yellow-capped tin onto her kimchi, mixes it, and consumes it with the remaining chicken and rice, frequently looking directly at the camera with satisfied expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio is characterized by high-fidelity ASMR recording of crunchy chewing and swallowing sounds. No background music is present. (2) Soft clinking sounds of metal chopsticks hitting the plastic containers and a spoon scooping rice are clearly audible. (3) A distinct 'squelch' and 'squeeze' sound occurs as sauce is poured onto the chicken. (4) Towards the end of the video, the woman speaks briefly in a high-pitched, friendly Korean female voice. (5) The soundscape remains focused on the textures of the food throughout the duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '只有韓國人才會這樣吃炸雞? How Koreans Eat Chicken' - A curiosity-based hook in Traditional Chinese and English. (2) '頂級洋釀炸雞' - Descriptive functional text identifying the dish. (3) '1. 配白飯', '2. 白飯+Kimchi', '3. 火辣雞醬' - Sequential instructional text. (4) '韓國人真的會這樣吃!' - Emphatic hook text. (5) '(我的專屬吃法)' - Personal variety-style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Sequential Demonstration of Eating Methods -> Personal Recommendation -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark grey ribbed long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor environment with a grey quilted headboard or soundproofing panel visible behind the creator.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting focusing on the food and face.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cuts synchronized with visual transitions

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Method 1 -> Method 2 -> Method 3 -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an ASMR food experience while educating the audience on specific Korean cultural habits for eating fried chicken, likely targeting a Chinese-speaking audience interested in Korean lifestyle.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear close-ups and brand display of '起家雞' (Cheogajip) chicken, Buldak sauce, and Ottogi sesame oil during usage.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-quality ASMR crunch sounds combined with instructional text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes cross-cultural appeal by featuring a Korean creator using Traditional Chinese text to reach a broader regional audience.
